title: mRNA-Seq Whole Transcriptome Analysis of a Single Cell
author: Catalin Barbacioru Fuchou Tang Kainqin Lao M Surani
content: E-GEOD-14605 mRNA-Seq Whole Transcriptome Analysis of a Single Cell RNA-seq of coding RNA EFO EFO_0003738 Mus musculus Here we modified a single cell whole transcriptome amplification method to make it capable of amplifying cDNAs as long as 3kb efficiently and unbiasedly.
